CareLink: Caregiving coordination app with medication reminders, adherence scoring, and AI wellness check-ins for seamless family health management.
SignGlove: Wearable glove that translates hand gestures into sign language using motion sensors and ML for accessible communication.
HabbitTracker: Productivity habit tracker with streak intelligence, behavioral analytics, and reminder scheduling to build lasting routines.

pest-detection: Plant disease detection system using deep learning to identify crop health issues and provide treatment recommendations in real-time.
DL: Deep learning projects and experiments exploring neural networks, transformers, and computer vision applications.
FedSkinLesion: Federated learning model for skin lesion classification that preserves privacy while improving dermatology diagnostic accuracy.
ClickbaitDetection: Machine learning classifier that identifies clickbait headlines using NLP and content analysis to combat misinformation.
LSTM: Long short-term memory neural network implementations for sequence modeling, time series prediction, and NLP tasks.
ExpenseTracker: Personal finance app with smart categorization, spending insights, and budget tracking for mindful money management.
ReFlow: Workflow optimization tool that analyzes task dependencies and schedules them for maximum efficiency and reduced idle time.
Portfolio: Personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and professional journey with interactive visualizations and 3D demos.

PYTHON: Collection of Python utilities, scripts, and learning projects exploring various domains and algorithmic patterns.
